description_long: This object consists of two classic toilet plungers, each featuring a long, straight wooden handle and a rubber suction cup at the base. One plunger has a red rubber cup, while the other has a black rubber cup, both with a slightly domed shape and a smooth, rounded rim. The handles are cylindrical, medium-brown in color, and appear to be made of unfinished or lightly finished wood, with no visible ergonomic shaping or texturing. The rubber cups are thick and sturdy, designed to create a strong seal against flat surfaces, and do not display any visible flanges or extended lips. There are no visible brand logos, manufacturing marks, or decorative elements on either the handles or the rubber cups. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function and durability, suitable for use in urban maintenance or cleaning scenarios.
description: A pair of classic toilet plungers with straight wooden handles and thick rubber cups, one red and one black, both with smooth rims and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red-cupped plunger in front and the black-cupped plunger partially obscured behind it, both with straight wooden handles.
description_view_1: Angled view displaying both plungers side by side, clearly showing the color difference between the red and black rubber cups.
description_view_2: Rear view with the black-cupped plunger in front and the red-cupped plunger behind, highlighting the symmetry and identical handle design.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again showing both plungers side by side with clear visibility of the cup colors and handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of medium-brown wood with a smooth, matte finish. There are no visible ergonomic features, ribbing, or texturing, and the design is simple and utilitarian.
attribute_rim_design: The rim at the base of each plunger cup is smooth, rounded, and slightly thickened, with no ribbing, reinforcement, or special patterns. The design is standard and functional.
